trending_themes.evidence: ADOR terminated Danielle's contract December 2025; filed 43.1 billion KRW lawsuit. ADOR's full legal team (Kim & Chang) resigned. Danielle's reps claim ADOR's withdrawal is 'malicious.' Trial ongoing May 2026.
Hanni, Haerin, Hyein spotted in Copenhagen April 2026 for preproduction. ADOR confirms 3-member comeback. Minji status uncertain; Danielle dropped.
Donated 10M KRW to single-parent families during lunar new year despite $31M lawsuit. Church appearance while smiling praised by netizens as resilience.
'New Jeans' track exceeded 500M Spotify streams February 2026. Total discography 7.3B+ streams. 15 tracks with 100M+ each. No new releases since 2024 'How Sweet.'

annotation_hooks: Structural breakdown mirroring lyrical themes: 'Super Shy,' 'Attention,' 'Hype Boy' celebrated youthful freedom — 2024-2026 legal fracturing inverts those into involuntary separation and control loss
Songs created under Min Hee-jin's direction now read differently post-controversy: are the newtro aesthetics genuine artistry or calculated branding?
Danielle's arc as tragedy-to-resilience: teenage artist isolated by label, now showing grace her label lacks. 500M streams proves commercial viability HYBE's mismanagement couldn't extinguish
raw_headlines: NewJeans ADOR Confirms Group Preparing for Comeback
Danielle's Side Claims ADOR Legal Team Withdrawal Is Malicious
ADOR Has Lost Its Entire Legal Team in Danielle Lawsuit
NewJeans Reaches 500M Spotify Streams with 'New Jeans'
Danielle Spotted Smiling at Church Amid $31M Lawsuit
